## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why this PR is needed.

## Related Issues

Link related issues (for example `Closes #123`).

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Validation

List the checks you ran and the results.

- [ ] Docs-only change (no runtime verification needed)
- [ ] iOS: `xcodebuild build`
- [ ] iOS: `xcodebuild test` (when relevant)
- [ ] Backend/CLI: targeted local verification for touched behavior

## Risk Notes

Call out rollout concerns, compatibility risk, or follow-up work if applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Single clear purpose
- [ ] Relevant docs updated
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added
- [ ] Security-impacting change reviewed against `SECURITY.md`
- [ ] I understand maintainers may decline roadmap-shaping PRs
